dashboard.title: My Workflows
dashboard.description: Create and manage your AI automation workflows
dashboard.noWorkflowsDesc: Create your first workflow to get started
dashboard.signInRequired: Sign in to view your workflows
dashboard.signInDesc: Create and manage AI automation workflows
dashboard.headerSubtitle: Compose nodes into pipelines. Trigger by webhook, schedule, or manually.

messages.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this workflow?

library.title: Library
library.publishConfirmMessage: Share this content with the community and earn credit rewards!
library.publishSuccess: Successfully published to library! You earned {{tokens}} credits.
library.unpublishConfirmMessage: Remove this content from the public library?

empty.title: No items yet
empty.description: The library is empty. Be the first to publish your AI-generated content!

images.title: Images
images.noImagesDesc: Use the prompt panel on the right to generate your first image with AI.
images.queuedSuccess: Image queued for generation. Check back in a few seconds.
images.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?
images.headerSubtitle: Generated images, recent first. Click to open the editor.

videos.title: Videos
videos.noVideosDesc: Use the prompt panel on the right to generate your first video with AI.
videos.queuedSuccess: Video queued for generation. Check back in 3-5 minutes.
videos.inpaintMinDuration: Video inpaint requires videos of at least 8 seconds
videos.headerSubtitle: Rendered clips, recent first. Hover to preview, click to open the editor.

batch.title: Batch Jobs
batch.description: Run workflows on multiple inputs from Excel/CSV files
batch.noBatchesDesc: Create your first batch job to run workflows on multiple inputs
batch.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this batch job?

detail.pauseMessage: Are you sure you want to pause this batch job? You can resume it later to continue processing remaining rows.
detail.cancelMessage: Are you sure you want to cancel this batch job? All progress will be reset and you will need to start over.

step1.title: Select Workflow
step1.description: Choose the workflow to run for each row in your file.

step2.title: Upload File
step2.description: Upload an Excel (.xlsx) or CSV file with your data.
step2.dropFile: Drop your file here or click to browse
step2.invalidFileType: Please upload an Excel (.xlsx) or CSV file

step3.title: Map Columns to Variables
step3.description: Connect your file columns to workflow input variables.
step3.mapAtLeast: Map at least one column to continue

step4.title: Job Settings
step4.enterName: Enter a name for this batch job
step4.concurrencyDesc: Number of rows to process in parallel (max: {{max}} for {{plan}} plan)
step4.concurrencyNote: * Actual concurrency may vary depending on the provider's rate limits.

step5.title: Review & Start
step5.startImmediatelyDesc: Begin processing as soon as the job is created

detail.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

create.title: Create Workflow
create.chooseTemplateDesc: Select a pre-built workflow or start from scratch
create.addNodesFailed: Failed to add nodes to workflow
create.addConnectionsFailed: Failed to add connections. You can add them manually in the editor.

templates.title: Workflow Templates
templates.description: Get started quickly with pre-built workflow templates

editor.title: Workflow Editor

validation.selectModel: Please select a model to use

editor.saveWarning: Saving now may affect the running execution. Changed node configurations may not apply to the current run, and unexpected results may occur.
editor.runWarning: Starting a new execution may interrupt the existing one. It may become difficult to track the status of the previous execution.
editor.deleteNodeConfirmNamed: node will be deleted. Are you sure?
editor.deleteNodeConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the selected node?
editor.deleteNodeWarning: This action cannot be undone. Connected edges will also be deleted.

workflowChat.title: AI Workflow Assistant
workflowChat.helperText: Describe what you want your workflow to do. For example: "Create a workflow that generates an image from text input and saves it to storage"
workflowChat.helperTextWithNodes: You have existing nodes. Describe modifications or additions, or ask to create a new workflow.
workflowChat.warningsFound: Some warnings occurred during workflow application
workflowChat.existingNodesMessage: You have nodes on the canvas. How would you like to apply the new workflow?

tools.title: AI Tools
tools.description: Explore all AI-powered tools for image and video creation
tools.noResults: No tools found matching your search

overview.title: Workflow Overview
overview.description: Workflows are visual pipelines that connect multiple AI operations together. Create complex automation by linking nodes that process data sequentially or in parallel. Each workflow can be triggered manually, on a schedule, or via webhook.
overview.mediaHint: [Video: Workflow editor walkthrough showing drag-and-drop node creation, connecting nodes, and running a workflow]
overview.tip2: Connect nodes by dragging from output to input ports
overview.tip3: Use the validation button before running

triggerManual.title: Manual Trigger
triggerManual.description: Start workflows on-demand with custom input. Choose between text input, image upload, or file upload. Perfect for one-off tasks or testing workflows before automation.
triggerManual.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Manual trigger node configuration panel showing input type options]
triggerManual.tip2: Use image input for workflows that process photos
triggerManual.tip3: Test your workflow with different inputs

triggerSchedule.title: Schedule Trigger
triggerSchedule.description: Automate workflows to run at specific times or intervals. Configure hourly, daily, weekly, or custom cron schedules. Ideal for recurring content generation or batch processing.
triggerSchedule.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Schedule configuration panel with cron expression builder]
triggerSchedule.tip1: Use static input values for scheduled workflows
triggerSchedule.tip2: Set up error notifications for failed runs

triggerWebhook.title: Webhook Trigger
triggerWebhook.description: Trigger workflows from external systems via HTTP POST requests. Receive JSON payloads and headers as workflow inputs. Perfect for integrating with other applications and services.
triggerWebhook.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Webhook settings showing URL, secret key, and sample curl command]
triggerWebhook.tip2: Use the secret key for authentication
triggerWebhook.tip3: Parse JSON payloads in subsequent nodes

execution.title: Execution & Monitoring
execution.description: Run workflows and monitor their progress in real-time. View execution logs, node outputs, and error messages. Track token usage and execution history for each workflow.
execution.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Execution logs accordion showing node-by-node progress with timing information]
execution.tip1: Check the execution logs for debugging
execution.tip2: Use the cancel button for long-running workflows
execution.tip3: Review token costs before running expensive workflows

outputStorage.title: Save to Storage
outputStorage.description: Save workflow outputs to your encrypted cloud storage. Organize files into folders, manage versions, and access your generated content from anywhere. All files are securely stored and can be downloaded or shared.
outputStorage.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Storage output node configuration with folder selection]
outputStorage.tip1: Create folders to organize outputs by project
outputStorage.tip2: Use meaningful file names for easy retrieval
outputStorage.tip3: Files are automatically encrypted at rest

outputWebhook.title: Webhook Output
outputWebhook.description: Send workflow results to external services via HTTP POST. Configure custom URLs, headers, and payload formats. Perfect for integrating with Slack, Discord, custom APIs, or any webhook-compatible service.
outputWebhook.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Webhook output configuration with URL and headers fields]
outputWebhook.tip1: Test your webhook endpoint before deploying
outputWebhook.tip2: Include authentication headers for secure endpoints
outputWebhook.tip3: Use JSON format for structured data delivery

textToImage.title: Text to Image
textToImage.description: Generate stunning images from text descriptions. Choose from multiple AI providers including GPT Image 2, Stable Diffusion 3.5, Flux Pro, Imagen 3, and Grok Aurora. Customize aspect ratio, style, and quality settings.
textToImage.mediaHint: [Image Grid: 4 sample generated images showing different styles - photorealistic, illustration, 3D render, anime]
textToImage.tip2: Use negative prompts to exclude unwanted elements
textToImage.tip3: Experiment with different providers for varied styles

imageToImage.title: Image to Image
imageToImage.description: Transform existing images using AI. Apply style changes, modify content, or enhance details while maintaining the original composition. Control transformation strength for subtle or dramatic changes.
imageToImage.mediaHint: [Before/After Comparison: Original photo on left, AI-transformed version on right]
imageToImage.tip1: Lower strength preserves more of the original
imageToImage.tip2: Use reference images for style consistency
imageToImage.tip3: Combine with text prompts for guided transformations

inpainting.title: Inpainting
inpainting.description: Edit specific regions of an image using masks. Replace objects, fix imperfections, or add new elements seamlessly. The AI fills masked areas based on your prompt and surrounding context.
inpainting.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Inpainting interface showing mask painting tool and before/after result]
inpainting.tip1: Create clean masks for better results
inpainting.tip3: Use feathered edges for smoother blending

outpainting.title: Outpainting
outpainting.description: Extend images beyond their original boundaries. Expand in any direction - left, right, up, down, or all sides. The AI generates coherent content that seamlessly continues the original image.
outpainting.mediaHint: [Animated GIF: Image expanding outward in all directions with AI-generated content]
outpainting.tip2: Specify what should appear in extended areas
outpainting.tip3: Use multiple passes for large expansions

styleTransfer.title: Style Transfer
styleTransfer.description: Apply artistic styles from reference images to your content. Transform photos into paintings, sketches, or match any visual aesthetic. Adjust strength to control how much of the style is applied.
styleTransfer.mediaHint: [Grid: Same photo with 4 different style transfers - oil painting, watercolor, sketch, pop art]
styleTransfer.tip2: Adjust strength for subtle vs dramatic effects
styleTransfer.tip3: Combine with prompts for additional guidance

faceSwap.title: Face Swap
faceSwap.description: Seamlessly swap faces between images. The AI handles lighting, angle, and expression matching automatically. Great for creating personalized content or character consistency.
faceSwap.mediaHint: [Before/After: Source face and target image showing seamless face swap result]

bgRemoval.title: Background Removal
bgRemoval.description: Instantly remove backgrounds from images with AI precision. Handles complex edges like hair and transparent objects. Export with transparency or replace with custom backgrounds.
bgRemoval.mediaHint: [Before/After: Product photo with cluttered background vs clean transparent background]
bgRemoval.tip1: Works best with clear subject separation
bgRemoval.tip2: Use the mask output for fine-tuning

upscaling.title: Image Upscaling
upscaling.description: Enhance image resolution by 2x or 4x using AI. Restore detail and sharpness without the blur of traditional upscaling. Ideal for enlarging AI-generated images or old photos.
upscaling.mediaHint: [Comparison: Original low-res image vs AI-upscaled high-res version with visible detail improvement]
upscaling.tip1: Start with the best quality source available

textToVideo.title: Text to Video
textToVideo.description: Create videos from text descriptions. Choose from leading providers: Runway Gen-3, Kling v2.5, Luma Ray 2, Google Veo 2, and MiniMax. Configure duration (5-10 seconds), aspect ratio, and motion intensity.
textToVideo.mediaHint: [Video Player: Sample AI-generated video with playback controls]
textToVideo.tip1: Keep prompts focused on motion and action
textToVideo.tip2: Shorter durations often produce better results

imageToVideo.title: Image to Video
imageToVideo.description: Animate still images into dynamic videos. Provide a source image and motion description. Perfect for bringing artwork to life, creating cinemagraphs, or adding subtle animation to photos.
imageToVideo.mediaHint: [Side-by-side: Static image on left, animated video version on right]
imageToVideo.tip2: Describe specific movements for the subject

motionControl.title: Motion Control
motionControl.description: Transfer motion from a reference video to a subject in an image. Using Kling 2.6 Motion Control, animate characters or objects with precise movement matching from dance videos, gestures, or any motion source.
motionControl.mediaHint: [Video: Character from image performing dance moves from reference video]
motionControl.tip1: Use clear reference videos with distinct motion
motionControl.tip2: Image orientation affects maximum video length

videoUpscaling.title: Video Upscaling
videoUpscaling.description: Enhance video resolution to HD, Full HD, or 4K using Topaz AI. Improve frame rate up to 60fps for smoother playback. Perfect for upgrading AI-generated videos or restoring old footage.
videoUpscaling.mediaHint: [Comparison: Side-by-side of original SD video vs upscaled 4K version]
videoUpscaling.tip1: Higher target resolution requires more processing time
videoUpscaling.tip2: Frame rate interpolation can smooth motion
videoUpscaling.tip3: Best for footage without heavy compression artifacts

videoInpainting.title: Video Object Removal
videoInpainting.description: Remove unwanted objects from videos using mask-based inpainting. ProPainter provides high-quality object removal, while MiniMax offers faster processing. The AI fills removed areas with coherent content.
videoInpainting.mediaHint: [Before/After Video: Video with watermark/object vs clean version]
videoInpainting.tip1: Create accurate masks for the object to remove
videoInpainting.tip2: Increase mask dilation for cleaner edges
videoInpainting.tip3: Works best with stationary or slow-moving objects

overview.title: Using Templates
overview.description: Templates are pre-built workflows for common use cases. Browse the template gallery, preview the workflow structure, and instantly create a copy to customize for your needs. Templates save time and demonstrate best practices.
overview.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Template gallery with category filters and preview cards]
overview.tip1: Start with templates to learn workflow patterns
overview.tip2: Clone and modify rather than starting from scratch
overview.tip3: Check required providers before using a template

categories.title: Template Categories
categories.description: Browse templates by category: Content Creation, Marketing, E-commerce, Social Media, and more. Each category contains workflows optimized for specific use cases with detailed documentation.
categories.mediaHint: [Grid: Category icons with names - Content Creation, Marketing, E-commerce, Social Media, Art & Design]
categories.tip1: Filter by provider to find compatible templates
categories.tip3: Check estimated token costs before running

creating.title: Creating Templates
creating.description: Turn your workflows into reusable templates. Add descriptions, configure default settings, and share with your team. Templates preserve the workflow structure while allowing customization of inputs and settings.
creating.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Save as Template dialog with name, description, and category fields]
creating.tip3: Test template with various inputs before sharing

inputType.label: Input Type
inputType.notes: Determines what type of data users can provide

schedule.label: Schedule
schedule.notes: Cron format: * * * * * (min hour day month weekday)

staticInput.label: Static Input
staticInput.notes: Pre-defined input for each scheduled run

model.label: Model
model.values: GPT Image 2, SD 3.5, Flux Pro, Imagen 3, Grok Aurora

aspectRatio.label: Aspect Ratio
aspectRatio.notes: Some ratios may not be supported by all models

model.label: Model
model.values: Runway Gen-3, Kling 2.5, Luma Ray 2, Veo 2, MiniMax

orientation.label: Character Source
orientation.notes: Image: character from image, motion from video

maskDilation.label: Mask Dilation
maskDilation.notes: Expands mask edges for cleaner removal

minDuration.label: Min Video Length
minDuration.notes: Video must be at least 8s long

condition.label: Condition Type
condition.values: equals, contains, startsWith, endsWith, greaterThan, lessThan, isEmpty, isNotEmpty

customCode.label: Custom
customCode.notes: Use Script node for custom logic

model.label: Model
model.values: GPT Image 2, GPT Image 1, Imagen 3, Grok Aurora, SD 3.5, Flux Pro/Dev/Schnell

aspectRatio.label: Aspect Ratio
aspectRatio.notes: Square, Standard, Portrait, Widescreen, Vertical, Ultrawide

style.label: Style Preset
style.values: Instagram, Artistic, Photography, Mood, Era, Genre, Cultural

cameraAngles.label: Camera Angles
cameraAngles.values: Front, Back, Left, Right, Top, Bottom, 3/4 FL, 3/4 FR, 3/4 Back

editMode.label: Edit Mode
editMode.values: Upscale, Background Remove, Inpaint, Remove, Outpaint, Subject, Crop
editMode.notes: Select an image to enable edit modes

maskTools.label: Mask Tools
maskTools.notes: For Inpaint, Remove, Outpaint, Subject modes

detail.label: Detail Enhancement
detail.notes: Amount of new detail to generate

model.label: Model
model.values: Runway Gen-3, Kling v2.5, Luma Ray 2, Veo 2, MiniMax
model.notes: Different providers have unique motion styles

characterSource.label: Character Source
characterSource.notes: Image: up to 10s, Video: up to 5s output

editMode.label: Edit Mode
editMode.notes: Select a video to enable edit modes

inpaintMinDuration.label: Inpaint Min Duration
inpaintMinDuration.notes: Video must be at least 8s for inpainting

overview.title: Batch Jobs Overview
overview.description: Process multiple inputs through a workflow in a single batch job. Upload CSV files, image folders, or text lists. Track progress, view results, and download outputs in bulk. Perfect for high-volume content generation.
overview.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Batch job dashboard showing active jobs, progress bars, and completed jobs list]
overview.tip1: Start with small batches to test
overview.tip2: Monitor token usage for large batches
overview.tip3: Use CSV for structured data inputs

csvInput.title: CSV Input
csvInput.description: Upload CSV files with columns mapped to workflow inputs. Each row becomes a separate workflow execution. Headers define input names. Great for product descriptions, translations, or data-driven generation.
csvInput.mediaHint: [Screenshot: CSV upload interface with column mapping to workflow inputs]
csvInput.tip1: Match CSV headers to node input names

imageBatch.title: Image Batch
imageBatch.description: Upload multiple images to process through image workflows. Apply consistent transformations, generate variations, or extract information from entire photo libraries.
imageBatch.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Image upload grid with drag-and-drop zone and file list]
imageBatch.tip2: Use consistent naming for output organization
imageBatch.tip3: Set appropriate quality settings for the batch size

results.title: Results & Downloads
results.description: View all batch outputs in a unified results view. Filter by status, preview individual results, and download as ZIP. Failed items can be retried individually or in bulk.
results.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Results gallery with filter dropdown, selection checkboxes, and download button]
results.tip1: Use filters to find specific results
results.tip3: Review failed items for common issues

delay.title: Delay
delay.description: Pause workflow execution for a specified duration. Useful for rate limiting API calls, waiting for external processes, or adding intentional delays between operations. The input data passes through unchanged after the delay.
delay.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Delay node in workflow showing timer configuration]
delay.tip1: Use delays between API calls to avoid rate limits
delay.tip2: Combine with loops for polling patterns
delay.tip3: Keep delays reasonable to avoid timeout issues

condition.title: Condition
condition.description: Branch your workflow based on conditional logic. Evaluate input data against conditions like equals, contains, greater than, or is empty. Route data to different paths based on whether the condition is true or false.
condition.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Condition node showing branching paths with true/false outputs]
condition.tip1: Use conditions to handle different response types
condition.tip2: Chain conditions for complex decision trees
condition.tip3: Always handle both true and false branches

loop.title: Loop
loop.description: Iterate over arrays or collections of items. Process each item individually through connected nodes. Perfect for batch operations, processing multiple files, or applying the same transformation to a list of inputs.
loop.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Loop node processing array items one by one]
loop.tip1: Set max iterations to prevent infinite loops
loop.tip2: Use with merge node to collect results
loop.tip3: Monitor memory usage with large collections

merge.title: Merge
merge.description: Combine multiple inputs into a single output. Merge data as an object, array, or concatenated text. Useful for collecting results from parallel branches, combining API responses, or aggregating processed data.
merge.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Merge node combining multiple inputs into one output]
merge.tip1: Use object mode for key-value data
merge.tip2: Use array mode to preserve order
merge.tip3: Concatenate mode works best for text outputs

split.title: Split
split.description: Divide input into multiple parts based on a separator. Split text by commas, newlines, or custom delimiters. Returns the first part and remaining parts as separate outputs for different processing paths.
split.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Split node dividing text input into separate outputs]
split.tip1: Use newline separator for multi-line text
split.tip2: Combine with loop to process each part
split.tip3: Handle edge cases when input has no separator

transform.title: Transform
transform.description: Transform data format or structure. Convert text to uppercase/lowercase, trim whitespace, parse JSON strings, or stringify objects. Essential for data preparation and format conversion between nodes.
transform.tip1: Use parseJson before accessing JSON properties
transform.tip2: Trim whitespace to avoid comparison issues

httpRequest.title: HTTP Request
httpRequest.description: Make HTTP API calls to external services. Support for GET, POST, PUT, PATCH, and DELETE methods. Configure custom headers and request body. Integrate with any REST API or webhook endpoint.
httpRequest.mediaHint: [Screenshot: HTTP Request node configuration with URL, method, and headers]
httpRequest.tip1: Store API keys securely, not in workflow
httpRequest.tip2: Use delay nodes between requests for rate limiting
httpRequest.tip3: Parse JSON responses with transform node

overview.title: Image Features Overview
overview.description: Explore Iris's powerful image generation and editing capabilities. Create stunning images from text prompts, transform existing images with AI, and apply professional post-processing effects. All generated images are stored securely in your cloud storage.
overview.mediaHint: [Video: Image gallery showcase with various AI-generated images across different styles]
overview.tip1: Use the prompt panel on the right to generate images
overview.tip2: Select images to access advanced editing features
overview.tip3: Images are automatically saved to your storage

generation.title: Image Generation Options
generation.description: Configure your image generation with precise control over output. Choose your preferred AI model, set aspect ratios for different use cases, apply style presets, and generate multiple variations at once. Combine with post-processing options for professional results.
generation.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Prompt panel showing model selector, aspect ratio, style picker, and image count options]
generation.tip1: Different models excel at different styles
generation.tip2: Use negative prompts to exclude unwanted elements
generation.tip3: Generate multiple images to find the perfect result

models.title: Available Models
models.description: Choose from industry-leading AI image models. GPT Image 2 delivers 2K resolution with reasoning-based generation, Imagen 3 produces photorealistic results, Grok Aurora brings artistic flair, Stable Diffusion 3.5 offers fine control, and Flux Pro/Dev/Schnell provide speed-quality tradeoffs.
models.mediaHint: [Grid: Same prompt generated across different models showing unique characteristics]
models.tip1: Flux Pro offers the best quality-to-speed ratio
models.tip2: GPT Image 2 handles complex multi-element prompts and text rendering well
models.tip3: Try multiple models to find your preferred style

styles.title: Style Presets
styles.description: Apply curated style presets to guide your image generation. Browse categories including Instagram filters, artistic movements, photography styles, mood lighting, historical eras, genre aesthetics, and cultural themes. Style prompts are automatically combined with your main prompt.
styles.mediaHint: [Grid: Same subject with different style presets applied - Cinematic, Anime, Watercolor, Vintage]
styles.tip1: Styles work by adding descriptive text to your prompt
styles.tip2: Combine styles with specific camera angles for consistency
styles.tip3: Use mood styles for emotional impact in your images

editing.title: Edit Modes
editing.description: Transform your images with powerful AI editing tools. Select any generated image to access edit modes: Upscale to enhance resolution, Background Remove for transparent exports, Inpaint to modify specific regions, Remove objects seamlessly, Outpaint to extend boundaries, Subject mode to place objects in new scenes, and Crop for precise framing.
editing.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Edit mode selector showing all available editing options with icons]
editing.tip1: Select an image first to enable edit modes
editing.tip2: Combine multiple edit operations for complex transformations
editing.tip3: Use masks for precise control over affected regions

inpaintOutpaint.title: Inpainting & Outpainting
inpaintOutpaint.description: Modify specific regions of your images with precision. Inpainting lets you paint a mask over areas to replace or modify, then describe what should appear. Outpainting extends your image beyond its original boundaries in any direction, generating coherent new content that matches the original style.
inpaintOutpaint.mediaHint: [Before/After: Image with masked region showing inpainted result, and image with expanded canvas showing outpainted content]
inpaintOutpaint.tip1: Create clean, well-defined masks for best results
inpaintOutpaint.tip2: Provide detailed prompts for inpainted regions
inpaintOutpaint.tip3: Outpaint in multiple passes for large expansions

cropUpscale.title: Crop & Upscale
cropUpscale.description: Perfect your images with crop and upscale tools. Crop to reframe your composition or extract specific regions. Upscale uses AI to increase resolution by 2x or 4x while adding detail and sharpness. Configure resemblance (how closely to match the original) and detail enhancement (how much new detail to generate).
cropUpscale.mediaHint: [Comparison: Original image vs 4x upscaled version showing enhanced detail]
cropUpscale.tip1: Crop before upscaling to save processing time
cropUpscale.tip2: 2x upscale is often sufficient for most uses
cropUpscale.tip3: Adjust resemblance higher for faithful enlargements

cameraAngles.title: Camera Angles
cameraAngles.description: Maintain 3D consistency across multiple image generations using the camera angle system. Choose from 9 standard angles: Front, Back, Left, Right, Top, Bottom, and three 3/4 views. Generate the same subject from multiple angles simultaneously to create character sheets or product visualizations.
cameraAngles.mediaHint: [Grid: Same character generated from 9 different camera angles showing consistent appearance]
cameraAngles.tip1: Use camera angles for character turnarounds
cameraAngles.tip2: Select multiple angles to batch generate variations
cameraAngles.tip3: Combine with subject names for better consistency

generate.title: Image Generation
generate.description: Generate images from text prompts or transform existing images using AI models. Supports text-to-image and image-to-image workflows with multiple providers including FLUX, Stable Diffusion, and GPT Image. Configure aspect ratios, negative prompts, and batch counts for optimal results.
generate.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Image generation panel with prompt input and model selection]
generate.tip1: Use detailed, descriptive prompts for better results
generate.tip2: Try image-to-image mode for style transfer on existing photos
generate.tip3: Experiment with different AI models to find your preferred style

crop.title: Crop
crop.description: Precisely crop images with free-form or fixed aspect ratio modes. Supports common presets like 1:1, 4:3, 16:9, and custom ratios. Crop handles can be dragged to define the exact region, with real-time preview of the resulting image.
crop.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Crop tool with aspect ratio selector and drag handles]
crop.tip1: Hold Shift to maintain aspect ratio while dragging
crop.tip2: Use preset ratios for social media dimensions
crop.tip3: Crop before applying other edits to save processing

adjust.title: Adjustments
adjust.description: Fine-tune image appearance with professional adjustment controls. Modify brightness, contrast, saturation, hue, exposure, highlights, shadows, whites, blacks, temperature, tint, vibrance, and clarity. Includes levels and curves for advanced tonal control.
adjust.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Adjustment sliders panel showing brightness, contrast, and color controls]
adjust.tip1: Start with exposure and contrast for basic corrections
adjust.tip2: Use the histogram to guide your adjustments
adjust.tip3: Apply subtle changes for natural-looking results

filter.title: Filters
filter.description: Apply one-click artistic and photographic filters to transform image appearance. Choose from categories including vintage, cinematic, B&W, warm, cool, and creative effects. Each filter can be adjusted in intensity for subtle or dramatic looks.
filter.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Filter gallery showing thumbnail previews of available filters]
filter.tip1: Preview filters on your image before applying
filter.tip2: Adjust filter intensity for a natural look
filter.tip3: Combine filters with manual adjustments for unique styles

transform.title: Transform
transform.description: Apply geometric transformations to images including rotate, flip horizontal/vertical, scale, and skew. Precise controls allow exact angle input for rotation and percentage-based scaling. All transforms maintain image quality with anti-aliased rendering.
transform.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Transform controls with rotation, flip, and scale options]
transform.tip2: Flip horizontally to mirror selfie compositions
transform.tip3: Scale down before uploading to save bandwidth

brush.title: Brush, Pencil & Eraser
brush.description: Draw directly on images with configurable brush, pencil, and eraser tools. Adjust brush size, opacity, hardness, and color. Pencil provides hard-edged strokes for precise work. Eraser removes content to reveal the layer below or transparency.
brush.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Drawing tools toolbar with brush size and opacity controls]
brush.tip1: Use bracket keys [ ] to adjust brush size quickly
brush.tip2: Lower opacity for subtle, buildable strokes
brush.tip3: Switch to pencil for pixel-perfect detail work

shapes.title: Shapes
shapes.description: Add geometric shapes to your canvas including rectangles, ellipses, lines, arrows, polygons, and stars. Configure fill color, stroke color, stroke width, and corner radius. Shapes are rendered as vector objects for crisp edges at any zoom level.
shapes.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Shape tool options with fill and stroke color pickers]
shapes.tip1: Hold Shift while drawing for perfect squares and circles
shapes.tip2: Use arrows for annotations and callouts
shapes.tip3: Combine shapes with blend modes for creative effects

text.title: Text
text.description: Add and style text overlays on your images. Choose from system fonts with full control over size, color, alignment, letter spacing, line height, bold, italic, and underline styles. Text can be positioned freely and resized with handles.
text.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Text tool with font selection and styling options]
text.tip1: Use high-contrast colors for readability over images
text.tip2: Add a subtle shadow or outline for text on busy backgrounds
text.tip3: Keep text concise for visual impact

selectionTools.title: Selection Tools
selectionTools.description: Make precise selections using rectangular marquee, elliptical marquee, lasso, and magic wand tools. Selections define the active region for editing operations like painting, filtering, and transformations. Combine selections with add, subtract, and intersect modes.
selectionTools.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Selection tools with marquee, lasso, and magic wand options]
selectionTools.tip1: Use magic wand for quick selections of solid color areas
selectionTools.tip2: Feather selections for smooth, gradual edges
selectionTools.tip3: Invert selection to quickly target the background

colorRange.title: Color Range Selection
colorRange.description: Select regions based on color similarity with adjustable tolerance. Click to sample a color, then refine the selection by adjusting the tolerance slider. Perfect for isolating specific colors in an image for targeted editing or masking.
colorRange.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Color range dialog showing sampled color and tolerance slider]
colorRange.tip1: Start with low tolerance and increase gradually
colorRange.tip2: Use Shift+click to add more colors to the selection
colorRange.tip3: Preview the selection mask before applying

mask.title: Layer Masks
mask.description: Create non-destructive masks to control layer visibility. Paint with white to reveal, black to hide, and gray for partial transparency. Layer masks preserve the original image data while allowing complex compositing and blending effects.
mask.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Layer mask editing with black/white painting on mask thumbnail]
mask.tip1: Use a soft brush for smooth mask transitions
mask.tip2: Alt+click the mask thumbnail to view the mask directly
mask.tip3: Disable the mask temporarily to compare before/after

layerManagement.title: Layer Management
layerManagement.description: Organize your work with a full layer system. Create, delete, duplicate, reorder, and merge layers. Set opacity and blend modes (Normal, Multiply, Screen, Overlay, and more) for each layer. Group layers for organized, non-destructive editing.
layerManagement.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Layers panel showing multiple layers with blend modes and opacity]
layerManagement.tip1: Name your layers for better organization
layerManagement.tip2: Use Multiply blend mode for shadow effects
layerManagement.tip3: Flatten visible layers before export to reduce file size

upscale.title: AI Upscale
upscale.description: Enhance image resolution using AI-powered upscaling. Increase size by 2x or 4x while preserving detail and sharpness. The AI model intelligently adds detail that traditional upscaling methods cannot achieve, ideal for print preparation or enlarging AI-generated images.
upscale.mediaHint: [Comparison: Original resolution vs AI-upscaled showing enhanced detail]
upscale.tip1: 2x upscale is usually sufficient for most needs
upscale.tip2: Upscale after all other edits are complete
upscale.tip3: Check output for any AI artifacts in fine textures

bgRemove.title: Background Removal
bgRemove.description: Instantly remove image backgrounds using AI. Handles complex edges like hair, fur, and transparent objects with precision. The result is a clean alpha channel (transparency) that can be composited over any background or exported as PNG.
bgRemove.mediaHint: [Before/After: Portrait with complex background vs clean transparent result]
bgRemove.tip1: Works best with clear subject separation from background
bgRemove.tip2: Use the result as a layer for compositing
bgRemove.tip3: Export as PNG to preserve transparency

inpaint.title: AI Inpainting
inpaint.description: Replace or modify specific regions of an image using AI. Paint a mask over the area to edit, then provide a text prompt describing the desired replacement. The AI seamlessly fills the masked region while matching lighting, perspective, and style of the surrounding image.
inpaint.mediaHint: [Before/After: Image with masked region and AI-generated replacement]
inpaint.tip1: Create clean, well-defined masks for better results
inpaint.tip2: Provide detailed prompts about what should replace the masked area
inpaint.tip3: Use a larger mask area for more context-aware filling

outpaint.title: AI Outpainting
outpaint.description: Extend images beyond their original boundaries using AI. Expand the canvas in any direction and the AI generates coherent content that seamlessly continues the original composition. Describe what should appear in the extended areas for guided generation.
outpaint.mediaHint: [Before/After: Original image and expanded version with AI-generated surroundings]
outpaint.tip1: Extend one direction at a time for best quality
outpaint.tip2: Describe the expected content for guided outpainting
outpaint.tip3: Multiple passes produce better results for large expansions

faceRestore.title: Face Restoration
faceRestore.description: Enhance and restore faces in photos using AI. Improve facial details, fix artifacts, and enhance clarity in portraits. Particularly effective on AI-generated faces with minor imperfections or old/low-quality photographs that need facial enhancement.
faceRestore.mediaHint: [Before/After: Blurry/low-quality face vs AI-restored clear portrait]
faceRestore.tip1: Best results on images where faces are clearly visible
faceRestore.tip2: Combine with upscaling for maximum quality improvement
faceRestore.tip3: Review restored faces for naturalness before saving

colorize.title: AI Colorization
colorize.description: Automatically add realistic color to black-and-white or grayscale images using AI. The model analyzes image content and applies historically and contextually accurate colors. Perfect for restoring old photographs or creating colorized versions of monochrome artwork.
colorize.mediaHint: [Before/After: Black and white photo vs AI-colorized version]
colorize.tip1: Higher resolution source images produce better colorization
colorize.tip2: Compare results with reference images for accuracy
colorize.tip3: Fine-tune with manual color adjustments after AI colorization

histogram.title: Histogram & Analysis
histogram.description: View real-time histogram displaying the tonal distribution of your image across RGB, Red, Green, and Blue channels. Analyze exposure, contrast, and color balance at a glance. Use channel isolation to identify color casts and path-based analysis for detailed inspection.
histogram.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Histogram panel showing RGB distribution with individual channel overlays]
histogram.tip1: A well-exposed image has a balanced histogram
histogram.tip2: Clipping at edges indicates lost highlight or shadow detail
histogram.tip3: Use individual channels to identify color casts

actions.title: Actions (Record & Playback)
actions.description: Record sequences of editing operations as reusable actions. Play them back on any image to apply the same edits automatically. Perfect for batch processing, maintaining consistent styles, or creating complex multi-step presets that can be applied with a single click.
actions.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Actions panel with recorded steps and playback controls]
actions.tip1: Record simple, repeatable steps for best reliability
actions.tip2: Test actions on different images before batch processing
actions.tip3: Name actions descriptively for easy identification

saveExport.title: Save & Export
saveExport.description: Save your work in multiple formats including PNG, JPEG, WebP, PSD (with layers), and PDF. Configure quality, compression, color space, and DPI settings. Export optimized versions for web, print, or archive with a single click.
saveExport.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Export dialog with format selection, quality slider, and size options]
saveExport.tip1: Use PNG for images with transparency
saveExport.tip2: Save as PSD to preserve layers for future editing
saveExport.tip3: Adjust JPEG quality to balance file size and visual quality

projectManagement.title: Project & Media Pool
projectManagement.description: Create, open, save, and manage video editing projects. The media pool organizes all your video, audio, and image assets. Import media files, preview thumbnails, and drag assets onto the timeline. Projects auto-save to prevent data loss.
projectManagement.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Media pool panel with imported video and audio assets]
projectManagement.tip1: Organize media into folders before importing
projectManagement.tip2: Auto-save runs every 30 seconds to prevent data loss
projectManagement.tip3: Duplicate projects before making major changes

sourceMonitor.title: Source Monitor
sourceMonitor.description: Preview and prepare media clips before adding them to the timeline. Set In and Out points to select specific portions of a clip. Use keyboard shortcuts I (In) and O (Out) for quick marking. Insert selected ranges directly to the timeline with linked video and audio.
sourceMonitor.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Source monitor with In/Out point markers and insert controls]
sourceMonitor.tip1: Press I to set in point, O to set out point
sourceMonitor.tip2: Use Alt+X to clear in/out points
sourceMonitor.tip3: Preview the selected range before inserting to timeline

timelineEditing.title: Timeline Editing
timelineEditing.description: Multi-track timeline with drag-and-drop clip editing. Add, move, trim, split, and duplicate clips across video, audio, subtitle, music, and adjustment tracks. Supports snap-to-grid alignment, rubber-band selection, and linked audio/video clips.
timelineEditing.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Multi-track timeline with video, audio, and subtitle tracks]
timelineEditing.tip1: Press C to split clips at the playhead
timelineEditing.tip2: Hold Shift+Delete for ripple delete that closes the gap
timelineEditing.tip3: Use G to toggle snap-to-grid for precise alignment

advancedEditing.title: Advanced Editing
advancedEditing.description: Professional editing techniques including Ripple edit (adjust clip boundary, shift neighbors), Roll edit (move boundary between two clips), Slip edit (shift source content within fixed duration), Rate Stretch (change playback speed by dragging), and Bezier curve interpolation for smooth keyframe animation.
advancedEditing.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Timeline showing ripple and roll edit indicators]
advancedEditing.tip1: Alt+drag trim handles for roll edits
advancedEditing.tip2: Alt+drag the clip body for slip edits
advancedEditing.tip3: Alt+Shift+drag trim end for rate stretch

playback.title: Playback Controls
playback.description: Professional playback controls with JKL shuttle navigation. J plays reverse (press multiple times to speed up), K stops, L plays forward (press multiple times to speed up). Navigate frame-by-frame with arrow keys. Skip 10 frames with Shift+arrow. Home/End jump to start/end.
playback.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Playback controls bar with JKL shuttle and frame navigation]
playback.tip1: Use JKL keys for professional shuttle control
playback.tip2: Press K to stop, then use J/L for variable speed review
playback.tip3: Arrow keys navigate frame-by-frame for precise positioning

effectsKeyframes.title: Effects & Keyframes
effectsKeyframes.description: Apply visual effects to clips and animate any property over time with keyframes. Add effects from the built-in library, adjust parameters in the inspector, and set keyframes for smooth property animation. Supports linear and bezier interpolation between keyframes.
effectsKeyframes.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Effects panel with keyframe editor showing animated properties]
effectsKeyframes.tip1: Click the diamond icon to add keyframes at the playhead
effectsKeyframes.tip2: Use bezier curves for smooth, natural-looking animation
effectsKeyframes.tip3: Copy effects between clips to maintain consistency

colorCorrection.title: Color Correction (Lumetri)
colorCorrection.description: Professional color correction with a Premiere Pro-style Lumetri Color panel. Includes Basic corrections (exposure, contrast, temperature, tint, vibrance, saturation), Tone Curves with RGB channel control, Color Wheels (shadows/midtones/highlights), and HSL Secondary for per-hue adjustments across 8 color channels.
colorCorrection.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Lumetri Color panel showing basic corrections, curves, and color wheels]
colorCorrection.tip1: Start with Basic corrections before using advanced tools
colorCorrection.tip2: Use Color Wheels for creative color grading looks
colorCorrection.tip3: HSL Secondary lets you target specific colors for adjustment

audioMixer.title: Audio Mixer & DSP
audioMixer.description: Professional audio mixing with per-track volume faders, VU meters, solo/mute controls, and pan. Web Audio API-based DSP pipeline supports real-time audio processing. Set volume, apply fade-in/fade-out curves, and monitor peak levels for each audio track.
audioMixer.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Audio mixer panel with VU meters, faders, and solo/mute buttons]
audioMixer.tip1: Watch VU meters to avoid audio clipping
audioMixer.tip2: Use fade-in/fade-out for smooth audio transitions
audioMixer.tip3: Solo tracks to isolate and fine-tune individual audio sources

subtitleSystem.title: Subtitle System
subtitleSystem.description: Create and edit subtitle clips on dedicated subtitle tracks. Configure text content, font, size, color, position, and animation style. Subtitle clips snap to video timing and support animated entry/exit effects for professional-looking captions.
subtitleSystem.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Subtitle track with styled subtitle clips and preview overlay]
subtitleSystem.tip1: Keep subtitle text concise for readability
subtitleSystem.tip2: Use contrasting colors for visibility on varied backgrounds
subtitleSystem.tip3: Time subtitles to match spoken words precisely

autoCaptions.title: AI Auto Captions
autoCaptions.description: Automatically generate subtitles from video audio using AI speech recognition. Supports multiple languages and produces timed subtitle clips that align with spoken words. Generated captions can be edited, styled, and positioned after creation.
autoCaptions.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Auto captions modal with language selection and generated results]
autoCaptions.tip1: Ensure clear audio for accurate transcription
autoCaptions.tip2: Review generated captions for accuracy before finalizing
autoCaptions.tip3: Split long captions into shorter segments for readability

autocut.title: AI AutoCut
autocut.description: Automatically detect and extract highlight moments from long videos using AI analysis. The system analyzes speech patterns, visual interest, and energy levels to identify the most engaging segments. Export detected highlights as individual short-form clips ready for social media.
autocut.mediaHint: [Screenshot: AutoCut analysis results showing detected highlight segments with scores]
autocut.tip1: Works best with videos that have clear highlight moments
autocut.tip2: Adjust the highlight threshold to get more or fewer segments

autoReframe.title: AI Auto Reframe
autoReframe.description: Automatically convert video aspect ratios using AI subject tracking. Transform 16:9 landscape videos to 9:16 portrait, 1:1 square, or any target ratio while keeping the main subject centered. AI detects and follows faces and points of interest throughout the video.
autoReframe.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Auto Reframe dialog showing source and target aspect ratios with preview]
autoReframe.tip1: Best results with videos featuring a single main subject
autoReframe.tip2: Preview the reframed result before rendering
autoReframe.tip3: Works great for converting landscape footage to vertical social media

aiTools.title: AI Video Tools
aiTools.description: Suite of AI-powered video tools including Upscale (enhance resolution to HD/4K), Motion Control (transfer motion from reference video), Inpaint (remove/replace objects with masks), and Cut (trim video segments). Access tools from the editor toolbar or the AI menu.
aiTools.mediaHint: [Screenshot: AI tools dropdown menu showing Upscale, Motion Control, Inpaint, and Cut options]
aiTools.tip1: Upscale AI-generated videos for professional quality
aiTools.tip2: Use Motion Control for dance and gesture animation
aiTools.tip3: Inpaint to remove watermarks or unwanted objects

compoundMulticam.title: Compound, Nested & Multicam
compoundMulticam.description: Group multiple clips into compound clips for organized editing. Nest timelines within timelines for complex compositions. Multicam editing supports up to 9 camera angles with real-time switching — monitor all angles simultaneously and cut between them live during playback.
compoundMulticam.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Multicam monitor showing 4 camera angles with live switching controls]
compoundMulticam.tip1: Use compound clips to organize complex sequences
compoundMulticam.tip2: Double-click compound clips to edit their inner contents
compoundMulticam.tip3: Sync multicam angles by audio waveform or timecode

chromakeyProxy.title: Chroma Key & Proxy
chromakeyProxy.description: Real-time chroma key (green screen) compositing using Web Worker-based pixel processing. Pick the key color, adjust tolerance and edge softness, and enable spill suppression for clean composites. Proxy workflow generates lower-resolution copies for smooth editing of high-res footage.
chromakeyProxy.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Chroma key controls with color picker, tolerance slider, and live preview]
chromakeyProxy.tip1: Use evenly lit green/blue screens for best keying results
chromakeyProxy.tip2: Adjust edge softness to reduce fringing artifacts
chromakeyProxy.tip3: Enable proxy editing for smooth playback of 4K+ footage

transcript.title: Text-Based Editing
transcript.description: Edit video by editing text. The transcript panel displays speech-to-text output synchronized with the timeline. Select text ranges to select corresponding video segments. Delete text to remove video sections. A revolutionary way to edit talking-head and interview content.
transcript.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Transcript panel with text selection highlighting corresponding timeline clips]
transcript.tip1: Click words in the transcript to jump to that point in the video
transcript.tip2: Select and delete text to remove corresponding video sections
transcript.tip3: Use transcript search to find specific moments quickly

exportSettings.title: Export Settings
exportSettings.description: Configure video export with format (MP4/H.264, WebM), resolution (720p to 4K), frame rate (24/30/60fps), quality presets, and subtitle embedding options. Choose between burn-in subtitles or separate SRT files. Preview estimated file size before rendering.
exportSettings.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Export dialog with format, resolution, quality, and subtitle options]
exportSettings.tip1: Use H.264 MP4 for maximum compatibility
exportSettings.tip2: Lower resolution exports are faster for draft reviews
exportSettings.tip3: Burn in subtitles for social media, use SRT for YouTube

ffmpegRender.title: FFmpeg Local Rendering
ffmpegRender.description: Render the final video locally using FFmpeg integrated into the desktop application. The rendering pipeline composites all tracks, applies effects, encodes audio/video, and produces the final output file. Monitor rendering progress with a real-time progress bar and preview.
ffmpegRender.mediaHint: [Screenshot: FFmpeg rendering progress with percentage, estimated time, and preview frame]
ffmpegRender.tip1: Close other applications during rendering for best performance
ffmpegRender.tip2: Preview a short section before rendering the full video
ffmpegRender.tip3: Hardware acceleration is used automatically when available

overview.title: Video Features Overview
overview.description: Create stunning AI-generated videos with Iris. Generate videos from text descriptions, animate still images, apply motion control from reference videos, and enhance with professional upscaling. All videos are processed in the cloud and saved to your secure storage.
overview.mediaHint: [Video: Showcase reel of various AI-generated videos demonstrating different styles and motions]
overview.tip2: Higher quality modes produce better but slower results
overview.tip3: Videos are automatically saved when complete

generation.title: Video Generation Options
generation.description: Configure your video generation with control over duration, aspect ratio, and quality. Choose landscape (16:9), portrait (9:16), or square (1:1) formats. Set duration from 5 to 10 seconds depending on the model. Describe motion and camera movement in your prompt for dynamic results.
generation.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Video prompt panel showing duration selector, aspect ratio picker, and model options]
generation.tip1: Keep prompts focused on motion and action
generation.tip2: Describe camera movement explicitly if desired
generation.tip3: Shorter durations often produce more coherent results

providers.title: Video Providers
providers.description: Choose from leading AI video providers. Runway Gen-3 offers cinematic quality, Kling v2.5/v2.6 excels at motion and offers Motion Control, Luma Ray 2 provides smooth animations, Google Veo 2 delivers high-fidelity output, and MiniMax offers fast processing with good quality.
providers.mediaHint: [Grid: Same prompt generated by different providers showing unique motion characteristics]
providers.tip1: Kling offers the best motion quality and Motion Control
providers.tip2: Runway excels at cinematic, atmospheric scenes
providers.tip3: MiniMax is fastest for quick iterations

motionControl.title: Motion Control
motionControl.description: Transfer motion from a reference video to your character or subject using Kling 2.6 Motion Control. Upload a dance video, gesture sequence, or any motion source, then apply it to an image. Choose between Standard and Pro quality modes. Character can come from an image (up to 10s) or video (up to 5s).
motionControl.mediaHint: [Video: Character from still image performing dance moves transferred from reference video]
motionControl.tip1: Use clear reference videos with distinct motion
motionControl.tip2: Pro mode offers higher quality at longer processing time
motionControl.tip3: Image orientation allows longer output videos

editing.title: Video Edit Modes
editing.description: Transform your videos with AI editing tools. Select any video to access edit modes: Motion Control to animate with reference motion, Inpaint to remove and replace objects with masks, Remove for seamless object removal, and Upscale to enhance resolution and frame rate.
editing.mediaHint: [Screenshot: Video edit mode selector showing Motion Control, Inpaint, Remove, and Upscale options]
editing.tip1: Select a video first to enable edit modes
editing.tip2: Video inpainting requires videos of at least 8 seconds
editing.tip3: Combine upscale with frame rate boost for smooth playback

upscale.title: Video Upscaling
upscale.description: Enhance video resolution and smoothness using Topaz AI upscaling. Upgrade to 720p, 1080p, or 4K resolution. Boost frame rate to 24, 30, 48, or 60fps for smoother motion. Perfect for preparing AI-generated videos for professional use or large screen display.
upscale.mediaHint: [Comparison: Side-by-side of original AI video vs 4K 60fps upscaled version]
upscale.tip1: Higher resolution requires more processing time
upscale.tip2: Frame rate interpolation smooths choppy AI motion
upscale.tip3: Best results from videos without heavy compression

nodeConfig.selectNode: Select a node to view its properties
nodeConfig.noSettings: No settings for this node type
nodeConfig.generateHint: Generate a unique URL to trigger this workflow
nodeConfig.regenerateConfirm: This will invalidate the current webhook URL. Continue?
nodeConfig.terminalNode: This is a terminal node. Results will be available in execution logs.
nodeConfig.autoSaveHint: Generated content is automatically saved to storage.
nodeConfig.userInputHint: User input will be passed to connected nodes as
nodeConfig.staticInputHint: Static input will be passed to connected nodes as
nodeConfig.storageOutput: Input data will be saved to cloud storage. The storage URL will be available in execution results.

prompt.imageRequired: This model requires a reference image. Please attach an image.
prompt.imageToVideoStartFrameRequired: Start frame is required for Image to Video mode.
prompt.imageToVideoPromptRequired: Prompt is required for Image to Video mode.
prompt.promptPlaceholder: Describe the {{type}} you want to create...
prompt.negativePromptPlaceholder: What to avoid in the generation...
prompt.cameraAngleMultiHint: Select multiple angles to generate variations
prompt.subject: Subject

storage.title: Select Storage Location
storage.createHint: Create a new folder to get started

selection.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} asset(s)? This action cannot be undone.

editModes.subject: Subject
editModes.outpaintHint: Enter the direction and content to expand in the prompt
editModes.angleHint: Hold and drag to change camera angle
editModes.bestAnglesHint: Generates images from 12 optimal angles (front, back, sides, and various tilts).

placeholders.inpaint: Describe the content for the redraw area. If left empty, it will be generated based on the original image.
placeholders.outpaint: Describe the content for the expanded area.
placeholders.subject: Describe the subject's characteristics.
placeholders.negative: Describe what to avoid in the generation.

video.inpaintPromptPlaceholder: Describe what should fill the masked area...
video.inpaintHint: Upload a mask image where white areas will be replaced. The prompt describes what to generate in those areas.
video.inpaintHintDraw: Draw on the video frame to mark areas you want to replace. Yellow areas will be filled with generated content.
video.removeHint: Brush over objects you want to remove. Yellow areas will be removed and filled with background.
video.loadErrorHint: Please try with a different video format or check your connection.
video.imageOrientationLimit: Image orientation is only available for videos under 10 seconds
video.orientationHelpImage: Use image as character, extract motion from video (10s limit)
video.orientationHelpVideo: Use video as character, apply image appearance
video.inpaintMinDurationDesc: Video inpaint requires videos of at least 8 seconds. Please use a longer video.
video.howToUseDesc: Combine a reference image with a motion source video to create a result video where your character performs the movements from the motion source.

motionControl.title: Motion Control
motionControl.description: Transfer motion from reference videos to your characters

cut.mergeDescription: Combine all segments into a single video
cut.individualDescription: Export each segment as a separate video

cutVideo.introDescription: Trim and cut your videos with precision. Select multiple segments and export them as a single merged video or individual clips.

inpaintVideo.introDescription: Remove and replace objects in your videos seamlessly. Draw a mask on the first frame and describe what should fill the area.

upscaleVideo.introDescription: Enhance your video resolution up to 4K with AI-powered upscaling. Improve frame rate and clarity while preserving original quality.

cropImage.introDescription: Precisely crop your images with flexible aspect ratios. Adjust the crop area to focus on the perfect composition.

crop.hint: Drag the corners or edges to adjust the crop area. Use the aspect ratio buttons to lock proportions.

upload.invalidType: {{name}} is not a valid file type

home.description: A single canvas for visual AI — image and video pipelines, batch jobs, and a library of presets honed for production work.

featured.subtitle: Most powerful AI tools for creative professionals — curated and tested.

home.communitySubtitle: A curated gallery of work made on Iris — fork, remix, or take notes.

automation.description: Chain AI operations into visual workflows. Process batches, trigger by schedule or webhook, and automate repetitive creative tasks.

hero.subtitle: Generate, edit, and transform images and videos using the most advanced AI models. Build powerful workflows and automate your creative process.

demo.title: Try the Workflow Builder
demo.subtitle: Drag nodes, connect handles, and explore how workflows work

features.title: Everything You Need for AI Creation
features.subtitle: From simple image generation to complex multi-step workflows, Iris provides all the tools you need.

workflow.title: Visual Workflow Builder
workflow.description: Drag-and-drop workflow editor for complex AI pipelines. Chain multiple operations together seamlessly. Create, save, and share your custom workflows with the team.

imageEditing.title: Advanced Image Editing
imageEditing.description: Inpainting, outpainting, style transfer, upscaling, and background removal.

videoGeneration.title: Video Generation
videoGeneration.description: Text-to-video, image-to-video, motion control, and video upscaling.

templates.title: Templates
templates.description: Pre-built workflow templates for common use cases. Get started quickly.

batch.title: Batch Processing
batch.description: Generate multiple variations at once. Process entire folders.

capabilities.title: Powerful Workflow Nodes
capabilities.subtitle: Build complex AI pipelines with 35+ specialized nodes

stats.title: All Major AI Providers in One Place
stats.subtitle: Access multiple AI providers through a single, unified interface.

testimonials.title: Loved by Creators
testimonials.subtitle: See what our users are saying

items.workflow: Visual workflow builder - no coding required
items.storage: Secure encrypted storage for all your assets

failedProcessing.question: Am I charged for failed processing?
failedProcessing.answer: No, there is absolutely no usage deduction for failed processing. Tokens are only deducted for successfully completed operations.

tokenPricing.question: What is token-based pricing?
tokenPricing.answer: Token-based pricing means you pay only for the AI processing you actually use. Tokens are units that measure the amount of text, images, or video processed. This gives you more flexibility compared to fixed usage limits - use more when you need it, save when you don't.

switchPlans.question: Can I switch plans at any time?
switchPlans.answer: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. When upgrading, you get immediate access to new features and additional tokens. When downgrading, changes take effect at the start of your next billing cycle.

tokenRollover.question: Do unused tokens roll over?
tokenRollover.answer: Unused tokens do not roll over. Your token balance resets at the beginning of each billing cycle.

paymentMethods.question: What payment methods do you accept?
paymentMethods.answer: We accept all major credit cards through Stripe. For enterprise customers, we also offer invoice-based billing.

discord.title: Join Our Community
discord.description: Connect with fellow creators, get help, share your work, and stay updated with the latest features and improvements.

cta.title: Ready to Create?
cta.subtitle: Start generating amazing images and videos with AI. No credit card required to get started.

video.title: Video Features
video.subtitle: Transform and enhance your videos with AI

motionControl.title: Motion Control
motionControl.description: Transfer motion from reference videos to your characters with Kling 2.6

inpaint.title: Video Inpaint
inpaint.description: Remove and replace objects in videos seamlessly with AI

remove.title: Object Removal
remove.description: Remove unwanted objects from videos automatically

upscale.title: Video Upscale
upscale.description: Enhance video resolution up to 4K with Topaz AI

cut.title: Video Cut
cut.description: Trim and edit video clips with precision

image.title: Image Features
image.subtitle: Create and edit stunning images with AI

upscale.title: Image Upscale
upscale.description: Enhance image resolution by 2x or 4x with AI detail generation

bgRemove.title: Background Remove
bgRemove.description: Instantly remove backgrounds with AI precision

crop.title: Smart Crop
crop.description: Crop and reframe images with intelligent composition

inpaint.title: Image Inpaint
inpaint.description: Edit specific regions of images using masks and prompts

outpaint.title: Outpaint
outpaint.description: Extend images beyond their original boundaries

subject.title: Subject Mode
subject.description: Extract and place subjects in new scenes

angle.title: Camera Angle
angle.description: Generate consistent images from multiple camera angles

create.title: Visual Workflow Builder
create.description: Drag-and-drop editor for complex AI pipelines

batch.title: Batch Processing
batch.description: Process multiple inputs with Excel/CSV files

templates.title: Workflow Templates
templates.description: Pre-built workflows for common use cases

version.title: Version History
version.description: Track all edits with non-destructive version control

cloud.title: Cloud Storage
cloud.description: Secure encrypted storage for all your assets
